domain.title: Custom Domain
domain.description: Configure a custom domain for your panel ({{domain}}.modl.gg).
domain.premiumRequiredDesc: Custom domains are a premium feature. Upgrade your plan to use this feature.
domain.invalidDomainDesc: Please enter a valid domain name (e.g. panel.example.com).
domain.cloudflareConfigFailed: Failed to configure domain with Cloudflare.
domain.configurationStartedDesc: Domain configuration has been initiated. Please set up your DNS records.
domain.configureFailed: Failed to configure domain. Please try again.
domain.domainVerifiedDesc: Your domain has been successfully verified.
domain.verificationInProgressDesc: Domain verification is in progress. Please wait a few minutes.
domain.verificationFailedDesc: Domain verification failed. Please check your DNS settings.
domain.verifyFailed: Failed to verify domain. Please try again.
domain.domainRemovedDesc: Your custom domain has been removed.
domain.removeFailed: Failed to remove domain. Please try again.
domain.premiumFeatureDesc: Custom domains are available on the Premium plan.
domain.editingRestrictedDesc: You are accessing the panel from a custom domain. To edit domain settings, visit
domain.cloudflareRequiredDesc: Your domain must be registered with Cloudflare for the proxied CNAME to work.
domain.cloudflareLearnPrefix: Learn how to set up Cloudflare
domain.dnsConfigDesc: Add the following DNS record to your domain's DNS provider.
domain.setupInstructionsDesc: Follow these steps to set up your custom domain.
domain.step1Desc: Enter your custom domain in the field above and click Configure Domain.
domain.step2Desc: In your Cloudflare DNS settings, add a CNAME record pointing to your modl subdomain.
domain.step3Desc: After adding the DNS record, click Verify to check that the record has propagated.
domain.step4Desc: Once verified, your panel will be accessible at your custom domain.
domain.notesDnsPropagation: DNS propagation can take up to 48 hours.
domain.notesOriginalAccess: Your original modl.gg URL will continue to work.
domain.notesRemovable: You can remove the custom domain at any time.
domain.notesCloudflareManaaged: Domain must be managed through Cloudflare.

welcome.title: Welcome to modl!
welcome.description: Here's a quick overview of what you need to get started.
welcome.installPlugin: Install the modl Minecraft plugin on your server to start tracking players and issuing punishments.

welcome.docsAfter: for detailed guides on all features.
welcome.bugReport: Found a bug or have a suggestion? Use the feedback button in the sidebar to let us know.
